chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Constitutional Petition No.S- 443 of 2025 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Petitioner: Syed Rehman Ali s/o Syed Akram Ali through Mr. Mashooque Ali Mahar, Advocate. Respondent: Mst. Syeda Shehla Rehman w/o Syed Rehman Ali. Nemo. Date of hearing: 24.10.2025 Date of Order: 11.11.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J.: For reasons to be recorded, the above-titled Petition is dismissed. JUDGE Tufail
